title: Top Trumps World Football Stars Top 200 Card Game Pack 4, Play with Salah, Mahrez, Dias and Darwin Nunez, educational gift for ages 6 plus
features: Entertaining educational card game loved for bringing your favourite Football players to life
Play Top Trumps anytime, anywhere, with as many people as you like
Find out how many goals Mohammed Salah has, how many international caps Mahrez has and who is more valuable between Dias and Nunez.
Easy-to-carry plastic case means there are no limits on gameplay
Prepare to outsmart your opponents, discover new and exciting facts and duel your way to becoming the Top Trump
description: From the manufacturer Start collecting all of the world's top players with Top Trumps World Football Stars Top 200. All the best players from the top leagues around the world – UK, France, Italy, USA, Germany, Spain, Middle East – both men and women, are all included. There are six packs to collect, and this is the fourth one. Find out who has more international caps out of Salah and Mahrez, and who's more valuable: Dias or Núñez? Compare stats, learn facts and battle it out to find out who is the Top Trump!
